title: Allay Duplication
body: # Allay Duplication ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.19-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20+%20Server-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) --- Bring 1.19.1 allay duplication to 1.19! Pop a music disc into a jukebox in the vicinity of an allay and they will start dancing! Give a dancing allay an amethyst shard to make them duplicate! --- ## Maintenance mode This mod will not be receiving future updates other than bugfixes.
